what_this_is: Per-call cost of one Toolkit.dispatch on a zero-arg async tool whose body returns immediately. Measures pure runner overhead: name lookup, kwargs merge, await, ToolResponse wrap. NO tool work, NO middleware, NO network.
what_this_is_not: End-to-end tool latency (which includes the tool's own HTTP / FS / DB work). Middleware-augmented dispatch (HITL gate, audit log, postprocess add their own deltas, measured separately in production telemetry).
reference_hardware: Production reference: see results/contributed/ for tier submissions. First contributor PR becomes the citable reference for each tier.
